fields.description: Master switch. Off = pure local Frappe, no Azure behaviour at all.
fields.label: Enabled

fields.description: Azure connection string (carries the account key): DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=...;AccountKey=...;EndpointSuffix=core.windows.net
fields.label: Connection String

fields.description: Name of the private Azure container you want files stored in (you set this). Created automatically if it doesn't exist.
fields.label: Private Container

fields.description: Lifetime of a download (SAS) link, in seconds. Leave blank to use 900 (15 min).
fields.label: Download Link Validity (seconds)

fields.description: Delete the local copy after a successful upload (the point of offloading). You choose.
fields.label: Remove Local Copy After Upload

fields.description: Doctypes whose attachments may be PUBLIC (one per line). Everything else is private by default (fail-closed). *Settings doctypes (logos) are always public. Leave blank unless a doctype's files must render without login.
fields.label: Public Attachment Doctypes
